products.name: Daily Balancing Authority Operations Report
products.description: Daily Balancing Authority Operations Report

products.name: 60-Day COP Adjustment Period Snapshot
products.description: Complete Current Operating Plan (COP) data for each QSE snapshot on each hour; confidentiality expired 60 day data. Previously named Complete Current Operating Plan Data.

products.name: Unplanned Resource Outages Report
products.description: This report contains a snapshot of all unplanned Resource outages (i.e., Forced Outages and Maintenance Outages) and derates that were active in the Outage Scheduler at any time on the third day before the posting date of this report. The data for these outages is submitted by operators of generation assets and is used by ERCOT staff in the operation of the Texas power grid. This report does not contain Resource outages for generators that are no longer operational on the Texas power grid or have not begun operating on the Texas power grid. This report contains all outages for Resources that are required to enter outages in the ERCOT Outage Scheduler including Generation Resources in Private Use Networks, and Energy Storage Resources. Some smaller operational derates are not required to be reported.

products.name: Monthly ERCOT Demand Response from Load Resources
products.description: The MW of Demand Response that is participating in the past month in Emergency Response Service (ERS), Ancillary Service as a Load Resource, or pilot project permitted by subsection (k) of P.U.C. Subst. R. 25.361, Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT), by Load Zone.

products.name: Hourly Resource Outage Capacity
products.description: This report includes all approved and accepted Planned, Forced and Maintenance Resource outages EXCEPT Resource outages for retirement of old equipment, seasonal mothballed (during the outaged season), and mothballed. The outage capacity in this report reflects aggregated ACTIVE resource outaged capacity by Load Zone sourced from the Outage Scheduler (OS) for the next 168 hours and is published every hour. Columns ‘C’ - ‘F’ consists of the aggregated outaged capacity of ALL the ACTIVE resource outages by Load Zone in the OS for each hour excluding the outages stated above, IRR resource outages, and new equipment outages. Columns ‘G’ - ‘J’ consists of the aggregated outaged capacity of ALL the ACTIVE IRR resource outages by Load Zone in the OS for each hour excluding the outages stated above, outages in columns ‘C’ - ‘F’ and new equipment outages. Columns ‘K’ - ‘N’ consists of the aggregated outaged capacity of ALL the ACTIVE New Equipment Energization resource outages by Load Zone. Note that this report contains OS data only and does not look at telemetry. It includes both entire resource outage and de-rates.

products.name: Seven-Day Load Forecast by Model and Weather Zone
products.description: Hourly system-wide Mid-Term Load Forecasts (MTLFs) for all forecast models with an indicator for which forecast was in use by ERCOT at the time of publication for current day plus the next 7.

artifacts.displayName: Seven-Day Load Forecast by Model and Weather Zone

products.name: Seven-Day Load Forecast by Model and Study Area
products.description: Forecasted hourly demands by Study Area, for the current day plus the next seven days.

artifacts.displayName: Seven-Day Load Forecast by Model and Study Area

products.name: Short-Term System Adequacy Report
products.description: The available On-Line Resource capacity for Generation Resources and the available capacity for Load Resources, for each hour of the current day and six days forward.

products.name: Hourly RUC Online In SCED Offline In COP Report
products.description: An hourly RUC report containing the sum of the HSLs of Generation Resources that are online in the most recent SCED execution and indicated as offline in its COP, for each hour of the RUC study period. Online SCED statuses are ONRUC, ON, ONOS, ONTEST, ONEMR, ONOPTOUT, STARTUP, ONSC, ONHOLD,  ONL, and OFFQS. Offline COP statuses are OFF, OUT, and EMR.

artifacts.displayName: Hourly RUC Online in SCED Offline in COP Report

products.name: Approved DC Tie Schedules
products.description: For each Direct Current Tie (DC Tie), the sum of any ERCOT-approved DC Tie Schedules for each 15-minute interval for the first seven days.  The sum shall be displayed as an absolute value and classified as a net import or net export.

products.name: 2-Day SCED Ancillary Service Disclosure
products.description: This report will contain all 2-day disclosure data related to Ancillary Services Offers for the Real-Time Market (RTM).

artifacts.displayName: 2-Day Aggregate SCED Ancillary Offer Curves NSPIN

products.description: This report contains 2-Day aggregate energy demand and supply curve disclosure data for the Day-Ahead Market (DAM).  The following file types are included in this report:  Energy Demand Curves, Energy Supply Curves, and Minimum Energy Supply Curves, including by Disclosure Area.

products.name: 2-Day DAM Bids and Offers Reports
products.description: This report will contain all 48 Hour disclosure data related to DAM. The following individual files are included in the report:  2-Day Total Cleared Energy Bids and Energy-Only Offers, 2-Day Total Cleared Energy Bids and Energy-Only Offers by Disclosure Areas, 2-Day Point-to-Point Obligation Bids, 2-Day Point-to-Point Obligation Bids by Disclosure Areas.

artifacts.displayName: 2-Day Total Cleared Energy Bids and Energy-Only Offers South

2-Day Total Cleared Energy Bids and Energy-Only Offers

products.name: 2-Day Real Time Gen and Load Data Reports
products.description: This report contains 2-Day aggregate disclosure data related to Real Time.  The following file types are included in this report: Aggregate Generation Summary, Aggregate Load Summary, and Aggregate Output Schedules, including by Disclosure Area.

products.name: 2-Day DAM Ancillary Services Reports
products.description: This report will contain all 48 Hour disclosure data related to DAM. The following individual files are included in the report:  2-Day Aggregate DAM AS Offers, 2-Day Cleared DAM AS, and 2-Day Self-Arranged AS.

artifacts.displayName: 2-Day Aggregated DAM Ancillary Service Offers NSPNM
2-Day Aggregated DAM Ancillary Service Offers ECRSS

products.name: 3-Day SCED Highest Price AS Offer Selected
products.description: This report provides the offer price and the name of the Entity submitting the offer for the highest-priced Ancillary Service (AS) Offer selected in the Real-Time Market (RTM) for each AS three days after the end of the applicable Operating Day.  If multiple Entities submitted the highest-priced offers selected, all Entities shall be identified.

artifacts.displayName: 3-Day SCED Highest Price AS Offer Selected

products.name: 3-Day DAM Highest Price AS Offer Selected
products.description: This report provides the offer price and the name of the Entity submitting the offer for the highest-priced Ancillary Service (AS) Offer selected in the Day-Ahead Market (DAM) for each AS three days after the end of the applicable Operating Day.  If multiple Entities submitted the highest-priced offers selected, all Entities shall be identified.

artifacts.displayName: 3-Day DAM Highest Price AS Offer Selected

products.name: 60-Day SCED Disclosure Reports
products.description: This report will contain all 60 day disclosure data related to SCED. The following individual files are included in the report: 60d_HDL_LDL_ManOverride; 60d_Load_Resource_Data_in_SCED; 60d_SCED_DSR_Load_Data; 60d_SCED_EOC_Updates_in_OpHour; 60d_SCED_Gen_Resource_Data; 60d_SCED_QSE_Self_Arranged; and 60d_SCED_SMNE_GEN_RES.

artifacts.displayName: 60-Day HDL and LDL Manual Override Summary
60-Day SCED Settlement Metered Net Energy for Generation Resources
60-Day SCED Energy Offer Curve Updates in Operating Hour

products.name: 60-Day DAM Disclosure Reports
products.description: This report will contain all 60 day disclosure data related to DAM. The following individual files are included in the report: 60d_DAM_EnergyBidAwards; 60d_DAM_EnergyBids; 60d_DAM_EnergyOnlyOfferAwards; 60d_DAM_EnergyOnlyOffers; 60d_DAM_Generation_Resource_ASOffers; 60d_DAM_Gen_Resource_Data; 60d_DAM_Load_Resource_ASOffers; 60d_DAM_Load_Resource_Data; 60d_DAM_PTPObligationBidAwards; 60d_DAM_PTPObligationBids; 60d_DAM_PTP_Obligation_Option; 60d_DAM_PTP_Obligation_OptionAwards; and 60d_DAM_QSE_Self_Arranged_AS.

products.name: 7-Day Event Trigger Posting
products.description: Seven days after the applicable Operating Day, ERCOT shall post the portion of any Resource's Energy Offer Curve or Energy Bid/Offer Curve that is at or above 50 times the Fuel Index Price (50xFIP) for any Security-Constrained Economic Dispatch (SCED) interval in the Real-Time Market (RTM) where any Real-Time Locational Marginal Price (LMP) exceeds 50xFIP, or the portion of any Resource’s Ancillary Service Offer that is at or above 50xFIP for any operating Hour in Day-Ahead Market (DAM) or any SCED intervals in Real-Time Market (RTM) where any Ancillary Service Market Clearing Price for Capacity (MCPC) exceeds 50xFIP.

artifacts.displayName: 7-Day Event Trigger Posting when LMP exceeds 50xFIP
7-Day Event Trigger Posting When DAM MCPC Exceeds 50xFIP
7-Day Event Trigger Posting when RTM MCPC exceeds 50xFIP

products.name: Resource Decision-Making Entity List
products.description: Daily Resource Decision-Making Entity List containing the decision-making entities for each Resource.

products.name: 60-Day SASM Disclosure Reports
products.description: This report will contain all 60 day disclosure data related to SASM for Generation and Load Resources. Report removed with PR447-03 RTC. Link to remain available until postings have expired.

artifacts.displayName: 60-Day SASM Generation Resource AS Offer Awards
60-Day SASM Load Resource AS Offer Awards

products.name: 60-Day COP All Updates
products.description: This report will contain all iterative Current Operating Plan (COP) submissions where a change has occurred for the operating day. Previously named 60-Day Current Operating Plan.

products.name: Load Distribution Factors
products.description: Load forecast distribution factors from which Market Participants can calculate Load at the Electrical Bus level by hour for the next seven days after a change in values.  A seasonal or manual change in values triggers the posting of the report.

products.name: Total Ancillary Service Offers
products.description: The total quantity in MW of Offers per Ancillary Service per hour from the Day-Ahead Market for the last thirty days on a daily basis which includes the following AS types: REGDN, REGUP, RRSPFR, RRSFFR, RRSUFR, NSPIN, ECRSS & ECRSM. Report removed with PR447-03 RTC.  Link to remain available until postings have expired.

products.name: DAM Hourly LMPs
products.description: The Hourly Locational Marginal Prices per electrical bus from the Day-Ahead Market for the last thirty days on a daily basis.

products.name: DAM Clearing Prices for Capacity
products.description: The Market Clearing Prices for Capacity for all Ancillary Services from the Day-Ahead Market.

products.name: DAM Settlement Point Prices
products.description: The Settlement Point Prices for all Resource Nodes, Load Zones, and Trading Hubs from the Day-Ahead Market.

products.name: DAM Shadow Prices
products.description: The active and binding constraints as well as the associated shadow prices from the Day-Ahead Market for the last thirty days on a daily basis.

products.name: DAM Total Energy Purchased
products.description: The total amount of energy purchased via energy bid/offer curves and energy-only bids per Settlement Point from the Day-Ahead Market (DAM) on a daily basis.

products.name: DAM Total Energy Sold
products.description: The total amount of energy sold via three-part supply offers, energy offer curves, and energy-only offers per Settlement Point from the Day-Ahead Market (DAM) on a daily basis.

products.name: DAM Price Corrections
products.description: Day-Ahead Market price corrections.

products.name: RTM Price Corrections
products.description: Real-Time Market price corrections

artifacts.displayName: RTM Price Corrections for Shadow Prices
RTM Price Corrections for SOG LMP
RTM Price Corrections for SOG Price
RTM Price Corrections for MCPCs by SCED Interval
RTM Price Corrections for EB LMP
RTM Price Corrections for MCPC by 15-Min Settlement Interval

products.name: DAM Aggregated Ancillary Service Offer Curve
products.description: The Day-Ahead Market (DAM) Aggregated Ancillary Service Offer Curve for the last 30 days which includes the following AS types: REGDN, REGUP, RRSPF, RRSFF, RRSUF, NSPIN, NSPNM, ECRSS, & ECRSM. Previously named Aggregated Ancillary Service Offer Curve.

artifacts.displayName: DAM Aggregated Ancillary Service Offer Curve

products.name: DAM and SCED Ancillary Service Demand Curves
products.description: Ancillary Service Demand Curve (ASDC) data for all AS Types by hour that will be used by DAM and SCED to procure Ancillary Services. If the AS Plan is altered, a new ASDC will be posted to reflect this change for applicable hours.

artifacts.displayName: DAM and SCED Ancillary Service Demand Curves

products.name: DAM Ancillary Service Plan
products.description: Ancillary Service requirements by type and quantity for each hour of the current day plus the next 6 days

products.name: Emergency Pricing Program Cumulative Hours Tracking
products.description: This report updates every 15 minutes and shows the sum of the Real-Time Market (RTM) System Lambda and Real-Time Reliability Deployment Price Adder for Energy, time-weight averaged to a 15-minute Settlement Interval. If this sum is greater than or equal to the High System-Wide Offer Cap for the Day-Ahead Market (DAM) for 12 hours within a rolling 24-hour period, an Emergency Offer Cap Effective Period initiates at the beginning of the next Operating Hour.

artifacts.displayName: Emergency Pricing Program Cumulative Hours Tracking

products.name: Hourly System-wide and Regional Wind Forecasts by Model
products.description: This report is posted every hour and includes system-wide and regional STWPF and WGRPP values produced by each forecast model for On-Line WGRs and the wind generation components of DC-Coupled Resources for the rolling historical 48-hour period and the rolling future 168-hour period and also indicates which forecast model is used for each region to populate COPs.  Previously named:  Hourly System-wide and Regional STWPF and WGRPP by Forecast Model.  Name change with implementation of PR373-01 FPP.

artifacts.displayName: Hourly System-wide and Regional Wind Forecasts by Model

products.name: Exceptional Fuel Cost Submission Report
products.description: The day following an Operating Day for which an Exceptional Fuel Cost is submitted, ERCOT shall post a report on the ERCOT website indicating the affected Operating Hours and the number of Resources for which a QSE submitted Exceptional Fuel Cost for a particular Operating Day.

products.name: DAM System Lambda
products.description: System lambda of each successful DAM

products.name: DAM Total Ancillary Services Sold
products.description: Ancillary Services sold in the DAM consisting of the total quantity of awarded Resource-Specific Ancillary Service Offers and Ancillary Service Only Offers, for each Ancillary Service for each hour of the Operating Day.

products.name: Wind Power Production - Hourly Averaged Actual and Forecasted Values
products.description: This report is posted every hour and includes System-wide and regional actual hourly averaged wind power production (GEN), STWPF, WGRPP and COP HSLs for On-Line WGRs for a rolling historical 48-hour period as well as the System-wide and regional STWPF, WGRPP and COP HSLs for On-Line WGRs for the rolling future 168-hour period. System-wide actual hourly averaged wind power potential (HSL) for a rolling historical 48-hour period is also included. Our forecasts attempt to predict HSL, which is uncurtailed power generation potential.

artifacts.displayName: Wind Power Production - Hourly Averaged Actual and Forecasted Values

products.name: Wind Power Production - Actual 5-Minute Averaged Values
products.description: This report is posted every 5 minutes and includes System-wide actual 5-min averaged wind power production (GEN) and wind power potential (HSL) for a rolling historical 60-minute period. Actual 5-min averaged wind power production (GEN) is also included at region level.

artifacts.displayName: Wind Power Production - Actual 5-Minute Averaged Values

products.name: Solar Power Production - Hourly Averaged Actual and Forecasted Values
products.description: This report includes System-wide actual hourly averaged solar power production (GEN), actual hourly averaged solar power potential (HSL), STPPF, PVGRPP, and COP HSLs for On-Line PVGRs for a rolling historical 48-hour period as well as the System-wide STPPF, PVGRPP and COP HSLs for On-Line PVGRs for the rolling future 168-hour period. Our forecasts attempt to predict HSL, which is uncurtailed power generation potential.

artifacts.displayName: Solar Power Production - Hourly Averaged Actual and Forecasted Values

products.name: Solar Power Production - Actual 5-Minute Averaged Values
products.description: This report is posted every 5 minutes and includes System-wide actual 5-minute averaged solar power production (GEN) and solar power potential (HSL) for On-Line PVGRs for a rolling historical 60-minute period.

artifacts.displayName: Solar Power Production - Actual 5-Minute Averaged Values

products.name: Wind Power Production - Hourly Averaged Actual and Forecasted Values by Geographical Region
products.description: This report is posted every hour and includes System-wide and geographic regional actual hourly averaged wind power production (GEN), STWPF, WGRPP and COP HSLs for On-Line WGRs for a rolling historical 48-hour period as well as the System-wide and regional STWPF, WGRPP and COP HSLs for On-Line WGRs for the rolling future 168-hour period. System-wide actual hourly averaged wind power potential (HSL) for a rolling historical 48-hour period is also included.  Our forecasts attempt to predict HSL, which is uncurtailed power generation potential.

artifacts.displayName: Wind Power Production - Hourly Averaged Actual and Forecasted Values by Geographical Region

products.name: Wind Power Production - Actual 5-Minute Averaged Values by Geographical Region
products.description: This report is posted every 5 minutes and includes System-wide actual 5-minute averaged wind power production (GEN) and wind power potential (HSL) for a rolling historical 60-minute period. Actual 5-min averaged wind power production (GEN) is also included at the geographic regional level.

artifacts.displayName: Wind Power Production - Actual 5-Minute Averaged Values by Geographical Region

products.name: Solar Power Production - Hourly Averaged Actual and Forecasted Values by Geographical Region
products.description: This report is posted every hour and includes System-wide and geographic regional hourly averaged solar power production (GEN), STPPF, PVGRPP, and COP HSL for On-Line PVGRs for a rolling historical 48-hour period as well as the system-wide and regional STPPF, PVGRPP, and COP HSL for On-Line PVGRs for the rolling future 168-hour period. System-wide actual hourly averaged solar power potential (HSL) for a rolling historical 48-hour period is also included. ERCOT's forecasts attempt to predict HSL, which is uncurtailed power generation potential.

artifacts.displayName: Solar Power Production - Hourly Averaged Actual and Forecasted Values by Geographical Region

products.name: Solar Power Production - Actual 5-Minute Averaged Values by Geographical Region
products.description: This report is posted every 5 minutes and includes System-wide actual 5-minute averaged solar power production (GEN) and solar power potential (HSL) for a rolling historical 60-minute period. Actual 5-min averaged solar power production (GEN) is also included at the geographic regional level.

artifacts.displayName: Solar Power Production - Actual 5-Minute Averaged Values by Geographical Region

products.name: ESR Integration Report
products.description: A high level summary of daily Energy Storage Resource generation and penetration records.

products.name: Day-Ahead and Real-Time System Wide-Offer Caps
products.description: The Day-Ahead and Real-Time Offer Caps in place for Ancillary Services and Energy for the last thirty days on a daily basis. Previously named System-Wide Offer Cap.

artifacts.displayName: Day-Ahead and Real-Time System Wide-Offer Caps

products.name: Weekly RUC Ancillary Service Deployment Factors
products.description: Ancillary Service Deployment Factors used by the Weekly Reliability Unit Commitment (WRUC) process for each hour in the RUC Study Period.

products.name: Projected Ancillary Service Deployments Factors
products.description: Provides the Ancillary Service Deployments Factors that are projected to be used in the DRUC and HRUC process for the next Operating Day.

products.name: Daily RUC Ancillary Service Deployment Factors
products.description: Ancillary Service Deployment Factors used by the Daily Reliability Unit Commitment (DRUC) process for each hour in the RUC Study Period.

products.name: Hourly RUC Ancillary Service Deployment Factors
products.description: Ancillary Service Deployment Factors used by the Hourly Reliability Unit Commitment (HRUC) process for each hour in the RUC Study Period.

products.name: SCED System Lambda
products.description: System lambda of each successful SCED

products.name: Real-Time Price Adders by SCED Interval
products.description: This report updates immediately following each SCED run and shows the Real-Time Reliability Deployment Price Adders for energy and for each ancillary service, the total RUC/RMR LDL relaxed, total Load Resource MW deployed that is added to the Demand, total ERS MW deployed that is added to the Demand, total LSL, and total HSL for each SCED interval. Name change from Real-Time ORDC and Reliability Deployment Price Adders and Reserves by SCED Interval.

artifacts.displayName: Real-Time Price Adders by SCED Interval

products.name: Real-Time Price Adders for 15-Minute Settlement Interval
products.description: This report updates immediately following the end of each 15-minute Settlement Interval and shows the Real-Time On-Line Reliability Deployment Price Adders for energy and each ancillary service type for each 15-minute Settlement Interval.  Previously named Real-Time ORDC and Reliability Deployment Prices for 15-minute Settlement Interval.

artifacts.displayName: Real-Time Price Adders for 15-Minute Settlement Interval

products.name: RTD Indicative Price Adders
products.description: This report updates immediately following each RTD run and shows the projected the Real-Time Reliability Deployment Price Adders for Energy and Ancillary Services for all the future intervals of the RTD run. This report also shows the total RUC/RMR LSDL relaxed, total Load Resource MW deployed that is added to the Demand, total ERS MW deployed that is added to the Demand, total LSL, total HSL for all the future intervals of the RTD run. Name change from RTD Indicative ORDC and Reliability Deployment Price Adders and Reserves.

products.name: LMP By SOG Including Price Adders
products.description: This report provides the nodal prices for Settlement Only Distribution Generators (SODGs) and Settlement Only Transmission Generators (SOTGs) for each SCED interval. The final prices also include the Real-Time Reliability Deployment Price Adders.

artifacts.displayName: LMP By SOG Including Price Adders

products.name: Total Capability of Resources Available to Provide Ancillary Service
products.description: Total capability of Resources available to provide Ancillary Service combinations, based on the Resource telemetry from the QSE and capped by the limits of the Resource and, for ESRs, further capped by Ancillary Service SCED duration requirements and current available State of Charge (SOC), for the most recent SCED execution.

artifacts.displayName: Total Capability of Resources Available to Provide Ancillary Service

products.name: RTD Indicative Real-Time MCPC
products.description: This report updates immediately following each Real-Time Dispatch (RTD) run and shows the projected Market Clearing Prices for Capacity for all Ancillary Services from the Real-time Market for all the future intervals of the RTD run.

products.name: Real-Time Clearing Prices for Capacity by 15-Minute Settlement Interval
products.description: The 15-minute Real-Time Market Clearing Price for Capacity for each Ancillary Service calculated using the time-weighted average of the sum of the Real-Time MCPCs and Real-Time Reliability Deployment Price Adders.

artifacts.displayName: Real-Time Clearing Prices for Capacity for 15-Minute Settlement Interval

products.name: Real-Time Clearing Prices for Capacity by SCED Interval
products.description: The Real-Time Market Clearing Prices for Capacity for each Ancillary Service normally produced by SCED every five minutes.

artifacts.displayName: Real-Time Clearing Prices for Capacity by SCED Interval

products.name: Actual System Load by Weather Zone
products.description: Report of Actual hourly load data by weather zone and ERCOT total.

artifacts.displayName: Actual System Load by Weather Zone

products.name: Actual System Load by Forecast Zone
products.description: A daily report of Actual System Load by Forecast Zone for each hour of the previous operating day.

artifacts.displayName: Actual System Load by Forecast Zone

products.name: LMPs by Electrical Bus
products.description: The Locational Marginal Price for each Electrical Bus, normally produced by SCED every five minutes.

products.name: LMPs by Resource Nodes, Load Zones and Trading Hubs
products.description: The Locational Marginal Price for each Settlement Point, normally produced by SCED every five minutes.

artifacts.displayName: LMPs by Resource Nodes, Load Zones and Trading Hubs

products.name: Historical Real-Time Price Adders by SCED Interval
products.description: This report updates every week for the previous week and shows the Real-Time On-Line Reliability Deployment Price Adders for energy and each ancillary service, the total RUC/RMR LDL relaxed, total Load Resource MW deployed that is added to the Demand, total ERS MW deployed that is added to the Demand, total LSL, and total HSL for each SCED interval in the previous week.  Previously named:  Historical Real Time ORDC and Reliability Deployment Price Adders and Reserves.

products.name: Historical Real-Time Price Adders for 15-Minute Settlement Interval
products.description: This report updates every week for the previous week and shows historical Real-Time On-Line Reliability Deployment Price Adders for energy and each ancillary service type for each 15-minute Settlement Interval of the previous week. Previously named:  Historical Real-Time ORDC and Reliability Deployment Prices for 15-minute Settlement Interval.

products.name: Historical Total Capability of Resources Available to Provide Ancillary Services by SCED Interval
products.description: This report updates every week for the previous week and shows the total capability of Resources available to provide the following Ancillary Service combinations, based on the Resource telemetry from the QSE and capped by the limits of the Resource and, for ESRs, further capped by Ancillary Service SCED duration requirements and current available State of Charge (SOC), for all SCED intervals of the previous week.

products.name: Historical RTM Clearing Prices for Capacity by SCED Interval
products.description: This report updates every week for the previous week and shows the Real-Time Market Clearing Prices for Capacity for each Ancillary Service produced by each SCED interval of the previous week.

products.name: Historical RTM Clearing Prices for Capacity by 15-Minute Settlement Interval
products.description: This report updates every week for the previous week and shows the 15-minute Real-Time Market Clearing Price for Capacity for each Ancillary Service for each 15-minute Settlement Interval of the previous week.

products.name: SCED Shadow Prices and Binding Transmission Constraints
products.description: The report for Shadow Prices of binding/violated constraints in SCED. The report shows the contingency name, overloaded element details (element name, from/to station name and kV level), Shadow Price ( price for resolving one MW of the constraint), Penalty for violating the constraint (MaxShadow Price), overloaded element limit and flow (value)pairs that caused such constraint.

artifacts.displayName: SCED Shadow Prices and Binding Transmission Constraints

products.name: Settlement Point Prices at Resource Nodes, Hubs and Load Zones
products.description: Settlement Point Price for each Settlement Point, produced from SCED LMPs every 15 minutes.

artifacts.displayName: Settlement Point Prices at Resource Nodes, Hubs and Load Zones

products.name: RTD Indicative LMPs by Resource Nodes, Load Zones and Hubs
products.description: This report is posted after every Look Ahead RTD run and includes indicative LMPs at Resource Nodes, Hub LMPs and Load Zone for each interval in the Look Ahead SCED-RTD Study Period.
